message:
fix(imports): update component import paths and extend color definitions

Import paths were stale after a prior refactor that moved components into
organized subdirectories. Also extends getColorDefinition() to return additional
fields (from, to, rgb) needed by downstream gradient and glow rendering.

- flywheel-visualization.tsx: bottom-sheet → ui/bottom-sheet, magnetic → motion/magnetic, NOISE_SVG_DATA_URI → lib/utils
- tldr-synergy-diagram.tsx: TldrFlywheelTool type moved to lib/flywheel-data
- lib/colors.ts: add from/to/rgb fields to all color definition return values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
